creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to tesu from comment #7)
> kldstat -v

Do you have radeonkms_load="YES" in /boot/loader.conf?

I don't know how to make /boot/loader.conf supersede /boot/modules/*, so I have written kld_list="/boot/modules/radeonkms.ko" in /etc/rc.conf.

So what happens if it is set up so that /boot/modules/radeonkms.ko is loaded instead of /boot/kernel/radeonkms.ko and the reboot is done?
